mapper.insert: insert into shanny_blog.users(uuid, user_id, mobile, password, status, type, create_time, update_time, last_login_time) values (#{uuid}, #{userId}, #{mobile}, #{password}, #{status}, #{type}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{lastLoginTime})

insert into shanny_blog.user_details(uuid, username, nickname, birthday, avatar, sex, create_time, update_time) values (#{uuid}, #{username}, #{nickname}, #{birthday}, #{avatar}, #{sex}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
